name: JMSFusion
description: Frontend enhancement plugin for Jellyfin Web and web-wrapper mobile clients; native Android TV clients are not supported.
overview: Custom script loader for the Jellyfin web UI.

versions.changelog:
v3.4.0

Changes:
- Enabled 4K request support for Seerr & Arr integration
- Updated detail modal trailer previews to respect trailer volume settings configured in the MonWUI panel
- Fixed multiple issues and inconsistencies in the HoverTrailer modal
- Improved trailer modal stability and playback behavior
- Applied various UI, compatibility, and performance refinements across the plugin

Notes:
- Restart Jellyfin after update
- Hard refresh (Ctrl + F5) may be required

v3.3.0

Changes:
- Added auto-play for active slider trailers with pause/resume controls and playback interruption on manual start (#58)
- Added trailer audio controls: mute on start, initial volume limit, and percentage-based volume settings (#58)
- Unified audio behavior across slider, hover, studio popover, YouTube iframe, and local video trailers (#58)
- Implemented full Live TV and TV Guide bypass for MonWUI features (hover trailers, pause overlay, parental PIN, cinema pre-roll, GMMP/player, studio popover, watchlist) (#57)
- Delegated Live TV playback entirely to Jellyfin native player (#57)
- Added Italian, Japanese, and Portuguese language support with detection and selection integration
- Translation files were sourced from MonWUI forks — thanks to the contributors
- Added new translation keys for auto slider trailers and trailer audio settings
- Improved watchlist behavior: favorites mirroring, Live TV exclusion, and auto-removal of watched series/seasons
- Improved API handling: AbortSignal support, hover-cancel logic, and playback-start event
- Added fallback layer for Jellyfin scroll event listener compatibility

Notes:
- Restart Jellyfin after update
- Hard refresh (Ctrl + F5) may be required

v3.2.0

Changes:
- Added Arr calendar integration: backend endpoint and notification panel calendar view
- Expanded Seerr requests: boxset/collection search, missing item selection, and bulk request flow
- Added fallback country selection for missing trailers in Cinema Pre-Roll settings
- Improved user settings synchronization: filtered sensitive snapshot keys and reduced redundant writes via idempotent storage and deduplication (#56)

Notes:
- Restart Jellyfin after update
- Hard refresh (Ctrl + F5) may be required

v3.1.0

Changes:
- Added Seerr & Arr integration: settings, connection testing, search, metadata proxy, request creation, listing, approval, rejection, and withdrawal flows
- Introduced Sonarr & Radarr fallback support: single episode requests routed to Sonarr, missing movie requests to Radarr with configurable quality profile, root folder, and search options
- Added request flows in Jellyfin UI for missing seasons, episodes, and collection movies with status tracking in notification panel and management screen
- Upgraded Cinema Pre-Roll to cache v5: excludes existing library items, filters by trailer recency, stores certification data, and applies Jellyfin native age rating filtering
- Added request button (Seerr/Radarr) to Cinema Pre-Roll screen; improved fetch timeouts, session locking, and replay prevention
- Enhanced parental PIN handling: supports multiple Jellyfin API models, user detection via header/query/claims, admin checks, logging, and native playback hook
- Expanded music playback integration: Jellyfin native play actions can be routed to GMMP with support for tracks, albums, artists, playlists, and folders
- Improved watchlist sharing: toggleable from settings, enriched snapshot data, and support for sharing items not in user's own list
- Refined watchlist preview and auto-removal: missing items shown via Seerr cards, corrected completion logic, and auto-removal only for items completed after being added/shared
- Added optional profile hiding in "Who’s Watching" module for non-admin users
- Extended settings panel: Seerr & Arr tab, module toggles, watchlist sharing option, and profile privacy controls
- Enhanced Runtime API: expanded Jellyfin field coverage, added dedupe for "Play Now" triggers, and improved PIN/pre-roll playback chain handling
- Improved location and slider settings panels with better unit handling and field visibility

Notes:
- Seerr and Arr services must be configured for request features
- Restart Jellyfin after update
- Hard refresh (Ctrl + F5) may be required

v3.0.0

Changes:
- Added Cinema Pre-Roll system with TMDb-based trailer playback
- Introduced server-side scoped JSON cache (replacing IndexedDB)
- Integrated trailer cards and enhanced detail modal for virtual items
- Improved slider behavior, UserData sync, and playback-aware updates
- Expanded cache coverage (home, recommendations, GMMP, slider data)
- Implemented automatic cache migration and new cache management tools
- Optimized recommendation logic and runtime cache handling
- Fixed "Who’s Watching" layout issue (issues #53)
- Updated smart auto-pause behavior (0 disables condition) (issues #52)

Notes:
- TMDb API key required for Cinema Pre-Roll
- Restart Jellyfin after update
- Hard refresh (Ctrl + F5) may be required

v2.9.1

Changes:
- Improved home slider initialization stability
- Prevented duplicate slider initialization while pending
- Delayed restore and repair operations until slide creation is fully completed
- Improved header offset synchronization across resize, navigation, visibility changes, and DOM mutations
- Reused slide metadata color seeds for active navigation dot styling consistency
- Applied minor slider and navigation refinements

Notes:
- Restart Jellyfin after update
- A hard refresh (Ctrl + F5) may be required after updating

v2.9.0

Changes:
- Improved Normal and Compact view styles
- Added details module support for Jellyfin original content cards on mobile devices
- Added smart list creation support to the watchlist module
- Removed fullscreen view style
- Replaced SVG quality badges with text-based labels
- Applied minor improvements across several modules

Notes:
- Restart Jellyfin after update
- A hard refresh (Ctrl + F5) may be required after updating

v2.8.0

Changes:
- Optimized home page rendering by decoupling heavy item metadata from user-specific data and extending static cache revalidation
- Improved performance and consistency across different data loading scenarios

- Enhanced slider, studio collections, and managed monwui UI cards to align with native app layout and ordering behavior

- Added optional colorization for studio collection background elements
- Added optional colorization for slider metadata icons

- Implemented dynamic offset calculation for slider and home sections based on header height

- Introduced mini statistics panel for watchlist items

- Updated runtime, configuration, and watchlist integration pathways for improved consistency and maintainability

- Removed forced CSS overrides for Jellyfin home layout when slider is disabled, allowing native layout behavior

Notes:
- Restart Jellyfin after update
- A hard refresh (Ctrl + F5) may be required after updating
